list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: implement robust data validation for currency input (ex 112)
- Create `useful.data.validation` module to decouple input handling from business logic. - Implement `readusd()` and `readbrl()` using try-except blocks to handle ValueErrors. - Add loop-based validation to ensure the program only proceeds with valid numeric data. - Integrate `locale` library for Brazilian currency formatting support.

task.summary: creation of module repository and first package.

feat: implement currency module with optional formatting (ex 107-108) - Create `currency.py` module with `half`, `double`, `increase`, and `decrease` functions. - Add `money()` function to handle US$ currency string formatting. - Introduce `show=False` optional parameter to all math functions, allowing them to return either raw floats for calculations or formatted strings for display.
feat: implement summary function on currency module

feat: implement robust data validation for currency input (ex 112)
- Create `useful.data.validation` module to decouple input handling from business logic. - Implement `readusd()` and `readbrl()` using try-except blocks to handle ValueErrors. - Add loop-based validation to ensure the program only proceeds with valid numeric data. - Integrate `locale` library for Brazilian currency formatting support.

MESSAGE.value: creation of module repository and first package.

feat: implement currency module with optional formatting (ex 107-108) - Create `currency.py` module with `half`, `double`, `increase`, and `decrease` functions. - Add `money()` function to handle US$ currency string formatting. - Introduce `show=False` optional parameter to all math functions, allowing them to return either raw floats for calculations or formatted strings for display.
feat: implement summary function on currency module

feat: implement robust data validation for currency input (ex 112)
- Create `useful.data.validation` module to decouple input handling from business logic. - Implement `readusd()` and `readbrl()` using try-except blocks to handle ValueErrors. - Add loop-based validation to ensure the program only proceeds with valid numeric data. - Integrate `locale` library for Brazilian currency formatting support.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: implement robust data validation for currency input (ex 112)
- Create `useful.data.validation` module to decouple input handling from business logic. - Implement `readusd()` and `readbrl()` using try-except blocks to handle ValueErrors. - Add loop-based validation to ensure the program only proceeds with valid numeric data. - Integrate `locale` library for Brazilian currency formatting support.
